nearme-info-heading: Heading shown before the user searches (parish-focused on Saintapedia).
nearme-info-description: Description shown before the user searches (parish-focused on Saintapedia).
nearme-show-button: Label for the button that requests geolocation and loads nearby parish results.
nearme-distance-km:
Distance label in kilometres. Parameters:
* $1 - formatted distance
nearme-distance-m:
Distance label in metres. Parameters:
* $1 - formatted distance
nearme-requirements: Title of the noscript error box.
nearme-requirements-guidance: Body of the noscript error box.
nearme-error-guidance: Guidance shown after a generic error.
nearme-noresults: Message when the search returns zero results.
nearme-noresults-guidance: Guidance when the search returns zero results.
nearme-permission-denied: Error when the user denies location permission.
nearme-error-cargo-missing: Error when Cargo is not installed.
nearme-error-unknown-table:
Error for an unknown Cargo table. Parameters:
* $1 - table name
